items.name: MASALA PAPAD
items.simplified_description: Crispy fried or baked papad topped with spicy masala.

items.name: VEGETABLE SPRING ROLL (8pcs)
items.description: Spiced stir-fried vegetables wrapped in Indian phyllo pastry fried till crisp, served with our special sweet chili sauce.
items.simplified_description: Crispy fried vegetable spring rolls served with sweet chili sauce.

items.name: VEGETABLE PAKODA
items.description: Seasonal assorted Indian vegetables coated with chickpea flour batter and fried till golden brown served with house made chutneys.
items.simplified_description: Fried assorted vegetables in chickpea batter served with chutneys.

items.name: ALOO TIKKI CHAAT
items.description: Delicately spiced and shallow fried potato patty cutlets served with chickpea curry smothered with in house chutneys and condiments.
items.simplified_description: Spiced fried potato patties with chickpea curry and chutneys.

items.name: PANEER PAKORA
items.description: Stuffed pressed cottage cheese dipped in gram flour batter and deep fried, served with in house chutneys.
items.simplified_description: Deep-fried cottage cheese fritters served with chutneys.

items.name: SAMOSA CHANA CHAAT
items.description: Our Savoury Fried pastry stuffed with chef special spice tempered potato and pea served with chickpea curry smothered with in house chutneys and condiments.
items.simplified_description: Fried pastry stuffed with spiced potatoes and peas, served with chickpea curry.

items.name: DAL MAKHNI
items.description: Black urad lentil simmered overnight with butter, dry fenugreek leaves and vine ripe fresh tomato paste.
items.simplified_description: Slow-cooked black lentils in buttery tomato sauce with fenugreek.

items.name: CHANA MASALA
items.description: Amritsari style choley, tempered with ancient punjabi spices mix, browned onion and slow roasted crushed tomato
items.simplified_description: Spiced chickpea curry with browned onions and roasted tomatoes.

items.name: DAL TADKA
items.description: Trio lentils gently boiled and tempered with cumin seeds in hot ghee & whole red chilies
items.simplified_description: Mixed lentils tempered with cumin, ghee, and whole red chilies.

items.name: ALOO GOBHI
items.description: Juicy and flavorful ribeye steak cooked to your liking, served with mashed potatoes and grilled vegetables
items.simplified_description: Steak served with mashed potatoes and grilled vegetables.

items.name: CHICKEN TIKKA MASALA
items.description: Chicken cooked in tomato base gravy with cream and other spices.
items.simplified_description: Chicken in creamy tomato-based spiced gravy.

items.name: Chicken Biryani
items.description: Overnight marinated chicken, layered with perfumed basmati rice sealed and cooked on a slow fire using age old dum method of cooking.
items.simplified_description: Slow-cooked marinated chicken layered with fragrant basmati rice.
